note: tmgmt_content is a TMGMT source submodule registering the 'content' source plugin over core content_translation. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded) probing documented facts; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 TMGMT site, what is the source plugin id used to translate a node, and how do I add node 5 to a job in code with it?
When a TMGMT translation of a node is accepted, how does tmgmt_content store the result, and what core module does it build on?
evals.expected_output: It writes the accepted values back as a core entity translation, building on core content_translation.

evals.prompt: I want referenced paragraphs to be translated in the same TMGMT job as the parent node. Which tmgmt_content config setting controls which reference fields are pulled in, and in which config object?
evals.expected_output: The embedded_fields setting in the tmgmt_content.settings config object lists reference fields whose targets are embedded into the same job.

evals.prompt: A custom field type serializes incorrectly when sent to TMGMT. Which tmgmt_content interface do I implement to control how a field is extracted and written back?
Which modules must be enabled for tmgmt_content to work, and which project is it part of?
evals.expected_output: It depends on tmgmt, core content_translation and block; it is part of the tmgmt project.
